nation: Mississaugas of Scugog Island First Nation
one_time_description: Loss on disposal of investment in Sonco Gaming UK Limited written off at amortized cost of $10,208,539
economic_notes: Nation operates commercial operations including resource centre, cottage and small business centre rentals, Noozhoo Nokiiyan LP. Committed to wastewater/well project $16,367,767, 5-plex $4,914,446, residential buildings $2,666,000, new office space $1,750,000. Post year-end: $930,000 CMHC financing for new five-plex; First Nations Finance Authority authorized $40M debt issuance, $8,605,900 drawn at report date.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Large deficit driven primarily by $10,208,539 loss on disposal of investment in Sonco Gaming UK Limited and significant economic development expenses of $28.3M. Nation holds substantial investment portfolio (~$124M) and large restricted reserves including Future Generations Fund ($56.2M), Community Betterment Fund ($96.8M), and Williams Treaty First Nations Reconciliation Fund ($10M). Accumulated surplus per statement of financial position includes remeasurement gains of $17,756,331 making total $190,891,791 vs $173,135,460 on operations statement. Restricted cash includes externally restricted CMHC housing fund ($107,414) and internally restricted accounts ($4,288,726). No schedule of remuneration provided. Four fully consolidated subsidiaries: Noozhoo Nokiiyan GP Inc., Noozhoo Nokiiyan LP, MSIFN (Island Road) Holdings Inc., 2810351 Ontario Inc.
